tool_args.label: St. George Ferry Terminal Signage Replacement

payload.claim_text: NYCT is seeking to undertake the removal of eight (8) non-functional digital wayfinding signs at the St. George Ferry Terminal and replace them with new metal signs. These digital signs, installed over fifteen (15) years ago as part of the Ferry Terminal renovation, are beyond repair.
